title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3 world model, Vera CPU layer for AI agents, and Isaac GR00T humanoid robot as an integrated physical AI stack. The video argues this represents a fundamental shift from screen-based AI to embodied systems that perceive, plan, and act in the physical world.
